name: Bullion Gold Resources Corp.
summary: Bullion Gold Resources Corp. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in British Columbia, Canada. It explores for gold and silver deposits. The company holds a 100% interest in the Turgeon Lake project, which consists of 39 mining claims located in the Abitibi area in the province of Quebec. It also holds an interest in the Lichen project comprising 238 mining claims that covers an area of 13,280 hectares located to the west of the Chibougamau mining camp. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
